creator: ladyandhersweetescapes
caption:
Save this for your next afternoon tea date! 

The Lobby Lounge at Dusit Thani Dubai has an afternoon tea with a Thai twist! 🥰 

Highlights of our tea time are:
• Mango sorbet and Thai basil 
• Thai rice wraps
• Mango sticky rice bonbons
• Thai ruby chestnuts 
• Smiley Lemon Macaroon
• Lavender Dream tea

Of course, the set also includes the classics: warm scones, light sandwiches, and cakes.

Tag your afternoon tea date.

📍 @dusitthanidubai 
🕑 Afternoon Tea: 2 to 5pm
☕️ AED 109 per person, AED 199 for 2 persons 

Afternoon Tea • Dubai • Dusit Thani Dubai • Lady and her Sweet Ecsapes
